text:
ELKHART, Ind. -- The Elkhart Police Department announced, in  partnership with Dunkin', it will hold "Cop on a Rooftop" at the Dunkin' location  on C.R. 6 on Friday, August 16, from 5 a.m. to noon, to raise money for Special  Olympics Indiana.

According to theofficial event page,for 10 years, Dunkin'  has teamed up with local police to raise money for the Special Olympics on  Dunkin' rooftops throughout Indiana.

EPD officials say even though they won't really be on the roof,  officers will be there collecting money for the cause.

The participating Dunkin' is located at 335 C.R. 6 in  Elkhart.

To view this video please enable JavaScript, and consider upgrading to a web browser thatsupports HTML5 video
title: 'Cop on a Rooftop' raising money for Special Olympics Indiana
